title: Understanding Bias-Variance Tradeoff
description: Conceptual overview of the bias-variance tradeoff in supervised learning, with intuitions on how model complexity affects generalization error.

title: Gradient Descent Variants: SGD, Momentum, and Adam
description: Structured comparison of the most common gradient-based optimizers, covering convergence properties, hyperparameter sensitivity, and practical usage guidelines.

title: Performance Patterns in Pandas
description: Notes on vectorization, avoiding iterrows, and leveraging Pandas internals to write faster data transformation pipelines.

title: Evaluation Metrics for Imbalanced Classification
description: A review of precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, and PR-AUC — with focus on which metrics matter in class-imbalanced settings like fraud detection and medical diagnosis.
